subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Dec. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: The Universal Races Congress was good, for it was intended for the furtherance and progress of unity
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal language, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
